name: @observer-protocol/x402-op-authorize
description: Observer Protocol authorization for x402 payments (Cloudflare Monetization Gateway, Coinbase x402). Wraps the agent's EVM signing account and verifies a signed, revocable delegation against the proposed x402 payment at the signer boundary, fail-closed: a denied payment is never signed, so it can never settle. Shared @observer-protocol/policy-engine core: only the decoder changed.

scripts.build: esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node18 --format=esm --external:viem --outfile=dist/index.mjs && esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node18 --format=cjs --external:viem --outfile=dist/index.cjs && tsc --emitDeclarationOnly --outDir dist
scripts.test: npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm run fixtures && node test/run.mjs
